questions.question:
A workload identity diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `identity-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `identity-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `metrics-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment metrics-api -n identity-lab -o wide`
- `serviceAccountCheck` is `kubectl get deployment metrics-api -n identity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.serviceAccountName}'`
- `automountCheck` is `kubectl get deployment metrics-api -n identity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.automountServiceAccountToken}'`
- `projectedTokenPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment metrics-api -n identity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].projected.sources[0].serviceAccountToken.path}'`
- `projectedAudienceCheck` is `kubectl get deployment metrics-api -n identity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].projected.sources[0].serviceAccountToken.audience}'`
- `mountPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment metrics-api -n identity-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].mountPath}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n identity-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm serviceAccountName, projected token audience, and mount path before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/identity-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/identity-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Identity Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live ServiceAccount fields during this drill.

verification.description: The identity diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, ServiceAccount inspection commands, projected token checks, event check, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact deployment inventory, identity checks, and safe manifest review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe identity remediation guidance is removed
